name: effected
description: Effect v4 development skills, specialist subagents (developer, reviewer, migrator), and a session briefing — distilled from the @effected package migrations and the official Effect-TS v4 guides: the @effected kit index, the house style, Schema-as-classes, services & layers, core idioms, observability, testing, the v3→v4 migration reference with its ordered checklist, and API-surface/hardening discipline
